reviews.comment:
Muy amables los jóvenes que atienden. Faltaría un semafóro en la calle Bernardo de Astrada, para la seguridad automotor y peatonal, por la presencia del hospital Provincial.

(Translated by Google)
The young people who work there are very friendly. A traffic light is needed on Bernardo de Astrada Street for the safety of both drivers and pedestrians, due to the presence of the Provincial Hospital.
